meaning: The power or skill to do something
sentences: She has the ability to learn quickly.
His ability to solve problems is remarkable.
The ability to adapt is essential in today's world.
Everyone admired her ability to remain calm under pressure.
Reading regularly can improve your ability to understand complex ideas.
